description: Recherche approfondie sur l'intégration IA dans la montre à gousset

userStories.title: Edge vs Cloud AI
userStories.description: Analyser les options d'exécution de l'IA
userStories.notes: Hybrid architecture recommended: Edge primary (95%) with cloud fallback. Edge latency <50ms vs cloud 100-500ms. NPU delivers 60% faster inference with 44% less power. Cloud costs $300-2000/month for 10k devices.

userStories.title: Modèles IA embarqués
userStories.description: Identifier les modèles adaptés à l'embarqué
userStories.notes: TensorFlow Lite Micro recommended (23ms inference, 89MB). SLM: Gemma 3 1B (529MB, 2585 tok/s). INT8 quantization reduces size 75% with <1% accuracy loss. Neuton.AI shows 10-14x smaller models than TFLite.

userStories.title: Cas d'usage IA prioritaires
userStories.description: Définir les fonctionnalités IA core du produit
userStories.notes: 10 use cases identified. MVP: Voice Assistant, Health Monitoring, Smart Notifications, Calendar AI. 65% of smartwatch users rely on voice assistants. Health AI market projected at $180B in 2025.

userStories.title: Privacy et données
userStories.description: Stratégie de gestion des données personnelles
userStories.notes: On-device processing for sensitive data (biometric, health). GDPR + EU AI Act compliance required by Aug 2027. PETs recommended: federated learning, differential privacy. Privacy-first defaults essential.

userStories.title: Partenariats IA possibles
userStories.description: Explorer les partenariats avec providers IA
userStories.notes: Open-source recommended for edge (Phi, Gemma, Llama - free). Cloud: Google Gemini Flash ($0.10/M tokens). Avoid API lock-in with edge-first architecture. OpenAI acquired Jony Ive team for wearables ($6.5B).
